items.scenario: You subscribed to a monthly meal-kit delivery service three months ago. This week's box arrived a full day late, and two of the chilled ingredients had already spoiled by the time it reached your door.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Trentino. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe what was wrong with this week's delivery
Explain how the late arrival affected the ingredients
Request a refund or a replacement box
items.subject: Spoiled ingredients in this week's meal-kit box

items.scenario: You moved into an off-campus apartment last month. The lease lists a reserved parking spot, but another tenant parks there every night, and you have nowhere else to leave your car after a late shift.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Quintero. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with your assigned parking spot
Explain how this affects you after late shifts
Ask how the building can enforce the assignment
items.subject: Someone else is using my assigned parking spot

items.scenario: You take part in a weekly recycling program in your neighborhood. The collection day was recently moved from Friday to Monday without notice, and several bins were left uncollected because residents did not know about the change.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Ashford. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the confusion the schedule change caused
Suggest how residents could be told about future changes
Ask whether the missed bins will be picked up soon
items.subject: Missed recycling bins after the new collection day

items.scenario: You booked a guided kayaking tour through a local outdoor company for next weekend. The website promised that all gear was included, but the confirmation email now says you must bring your own life jacket and paddle.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Bouchard. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the difference between the website and the confirmation
Ask whether the company can still provide the gear
Request clear details before the tour date
items.subject: Gear question for next weekend's kayaking tour
